fun plan(prNumber: Int): ConsistencyVerdict {
    val repoContextPaths = listOf(
        ".repo_context/README.md",
        ".repo_context/index.md",
        ".repo_context/maintenance.md",
        ".repo_context/generated/repo_index.md",
        ".repo_context/modules/overview/engineering-principles.md"
    )
    val repoContext = readFiles(repoContextPaths)
    val prMetadata = githubReadPullRequest(owner = "SiRumCz", repo = "yuanrong-datasystem", pullNumber = prNumber)
    val prFiles = githubReadPullRequestFiles(owner = "SiRumCz", repo = "yuanrong-datasystem", pullNumber = prNumber)
    val prDiff = githubReadPullRequestDiff(owner = "SiRumCz", repo = "yuanrong-datasystem", pullNumber = prNumber)
    val changedDomains = classifyChangedDomains(prFiles, repoContext)
    val relevantContextPaths = selectRelevantRepoContext(changedDomains, repoContext)
    val relevantContext = readFiles(relevantContextPaths)
    val docCandidatePaths = selectDocumentationCandidates(changedDomains, prFiles, repoContext, relevantContext)
    val docCandidateState = readFiles(docCandidatePaths)
    val docsVerdict = checkDocsUpdatedAppropriately(prMetadata, prFiles, prDiff, repoContext, relevantContext, docCandidateState)
    val testCandidatePaths = selectTestCandidates(changedDomains, prFiles, repoContext, relevantContext)
    val testCandidateState = readFiles(testCandidatePaths)
    val testsVerdict = checkTestsUpdatedAppropriately(prMetadata, prFiles, prDiff, repoContext, relevantContext, testCandidateState)
    val combinedVerdict = combineConsistencyVerdicts(docsVerdict, testsVerdict)
    return makeResult(combinedVerdict)
}
